title: Wabtec (WAB) Reaches 52-Week High: What's Aiding the Stock?
text: Bullish 2023 outlook, shareholder-friendly moves and plans to enter the railcars telematics market raise optimism about the Wabtec (WAB) stock.

title: 3 Transportation Stocks Poised to Continue Solid Run in 2024
text: Here, we present three transportation stocks -- WAB, SKYW, TNK -- which are likely to perform better in 2024.

title: Wabtec (WAB) Announces Entry Into Railcar Telematics Market
text: Wabtec (WAB) aims to produce telematics technology for rail cars. The product is likely to be ready in the first quarter of 2024.

title: Wabtec Announces Railcar Telematics Platform
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) announced today its entrance into the railcar telematics market via an agreement with Intermodal Telematics B.V. (“IMT”), a Dutch company, under which Wabtec will create a railcar telematics platform using IMT technology. Wabtec's new railcar telematics platform will deliver real-time information to railcar and tank container owners and operators, allowing them to turn rail cargo into smart, connected assets. title: AZUL November Passenger Traffic Increases From 2022 Levels
text: AZUL reports a load factor of 79.2% in November 2023.

title: UPS Expands in Asia With Hub at Hong Kong International Airport
text: The latest deal to open a new hub at the Hong Kong International Airport is part of UPS' ongoing expansion plans in Asia Pacific.

title: Wabtec (WAB) Touches 52-Week High: What's Driving the Stock?
text: Wabtec (WAB) raises its 2023 sales view in the $9.50-$9.70 billion range (prior view: $9.25-$9.50 billion).

title: Wabtec Earns Top Score in Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) announced today that it received a score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index (CEI), the nation's foremost benchmarking survey and report measuring corporate policies and practices related to LGBTQ+ workplace equality. The recognition comes as Wabtec makes significant year-over-year progress on all diversity, equity, and inclusion targets. “We are committed to advancing a diverse and inclusive workfor.
